tasks.name: Implement serde types for all 7 JSONL record types with overflow capture
Implement streaming JSONL parser with byte-offset tracking and error isolation

deviations.description: sourceToolAssistantUUID field required explicit serde(rename) attribute because rename_all = camelCase transforms source_tool_assistant_uuid to sourceToolAssistantUuid (lowercase 'u' in uuid), but the actual JSON field uses uppercase UUID. Added #[serde(rename = "sourceToolAssistantUUID")] to match the empirical data.
deviations.impact: none — test caught the mismatch immediately, fix was a one-line annotation

verification.cargo_test_all: pass — 38 tests (28 type deserialization + 10 parser), 0 failures, 0 warnings
verification.record_type_coverage: all 7 variants tested (user, assistant, progress, system, queue-operation, summary, file-history-snapshot)
verification.overflow_capture_verified: user, assistant, system, progress, usage_stats all tested with unknown fields landing in HashMap
verification.message_content_dual_form: string and block-array forms both tested
verification.content_block_variants: text, thinking (with/without signature), tool_use (with/without caller), tool_result (string/array content) all tested
verification.parser_byte_offset_accuracy: verified across multi-line files with computed expected offsets
verification.parser_error_isolation: malformed lines produce warnings, valid records before and after still parsed
